overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit commercial district. The player moves from a shaded sidewalk lined with holographic advertisements and palm trees toward an open waterfront plaza, transitioning from dense urban canyon to open public space.

distinctive orange building with curved architecture and yellow structural elements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic commercial sidewalk with a white kiosk structure on the left and the SOFTSYS building on the right. The camera moves forward under building overhangs into increasing shade, with neon signs providing ambient light. Palm trees and modern architecture line the path as the scene establishes the cyberpunk urban environment.

events.description: passes pedestrian in red coat walking in same direction on the left
vehicles pass by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dense urban corridor, overtaking a pedestrian in a red coat while maintaining steady pace

dark brick building wall with neon signage and closed storefronts
metal railing separating sidewalk from street traffic

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow urban canyon with tall buildings blocking most sky. Large holographic billboards dominate the center view while the camera passes a pedestrian in a red coat. The environment is heavily shaded with artificial neon lighting, and moderate vehicle traffic moves along the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitioning commercial corridor approaching open plaza

events.description: lighting brightens as the street opens up, revealing more sky ahead
approaching open plaza area with visible waterfront and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the urban canyon widens, approaching a sunlit open area with reduced pedestrian presence

entered.detail: piles of wooden pallets and construction supplies against the building wall
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
illuminated advertisement panel showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The urban environment begins to open up as the camera moves past construction materials on the left. The lighting transitions from artificial shade to natural sunlight ahead. An overhead walkway bridge becomes visible in the distance as the street widens approaching a plaza area with reduced building density.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront plaza with outdoor dining and promenade

events.description: enters open waterfront plaza with outdoor seating and clear sky overhead

agents.ego_description: walking into the open plaza area, approaching waterfront seating with a view of the water

notable_agents.action: people seated at outdoor tables under umbrellas, dining and conversing

entered.detail: large patio umbrellas shading outdoor dining tables and chairs
open view of water and distant shoreline beyond the plaza
futuristic digital information stand with glowing displays
arrangement of tables and chairs for outdoor dining

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a bright, sunlit waterfront plaza with full sky visibility. Outdoor dining areas with umbrellas occupy the left side where people sit at tables. The camera moves toward the water's edge, passing an information kiosk, with modern architecture framing the open promenade area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic commercial district that transitions from a wide, neon-lit sidewalk into a dense, shaded urban canyon. It begins by moving past a white kiosk and the SOFTSYS building, gliding under architectural overhangs where palm trees and modern structures line the path. As the camera pushes forward, the open sidewalk narrows and the sky is increasingly blocked by towering skyscrapers, shifting the lighting from ambient neon to deep urban shade. The scene then tightens into a corridor of artificial light, passing a pedestrian in a red coat while large holographic billboards dominate the view. Finally, the movement continues alongside a stream of vehicle traffic, fully immersing the perspective in the claustrophobic scale of the cyberpunk city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban corridor into a bright, open waterfront plaza. It begins by moving past construction materials as the dense city environment starts to open up, with the lighting transitioning from artificial shade toward natural sunlight. As the street widens and building density decreases, an overhead walkway bridge emerges in the distance, guiding the camera toward a spacious public area. The scene then expands into a sunlit promenade where outdoor dining areas with umbrellas and an information kiosk line the path. Finally, the camera moves toward the water's edge, framed by modern architecture under a clear, open sky.
